name: agent-cf-explorer

criteria.name: recall
criteria.description: Percentage of relevant files found during exploration

scoring.0: Finds less than 25% of the files relevant to the question
scoring.1: Finds 25-50% of relevant files — misses major areas of the codebase
scoring.2: Finds 50-80% of relevant files — covers main areas but misses some
scoring.3: Finds 80%+ of relevant files — thorough exploration of all related areas

criteria.name: precision
criteria.description: Percentage of found files that are actually relevant (avoids noise)

scoring.0: Less than 25% of referenced files are actually relevant to the question
scoring.1: 25-50% relevant — too much noise from unrelated files
scoring.2: 50-80% relevant — mostly on-target with some tangential references
scoring.3: 80%+ of referenced files are directly relevant — focused exploration

criteria.name: response_structure
criteria.description: Exploration results are organized and easy to navigate

scoring.0: Results are a disorganized stream of file contents with no structure
scoring.1: Results have some organization but key findings are buried
scoring.2: Results are well-organized but could better highlight the most important findings
scoring.3: Results are clearly structured with key findings upfront, supporting details organized by area

notes: Explorer is read-only and uses haiku. It should prioritize breadth of search over depth of analysis. File references should all point to real, existing files.
